seoTitle: Roxburgh Park vs Ruby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Roxburgh Park and Ruby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Roxburgh Park vs Ruby: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Roxburgh Park and Ruby.
heading: Roxburgh Park vs Ruby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Roxburgh Park, Victoria and Ruby, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Roxburgh Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ruby (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Roxburgh Park or Ruby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Roxburgh Park has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Ruby scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Roxburgh Park scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Ruby scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Roxburgh Park or Ruby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Roxburgh Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
